text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Special Week gets an offer to be
interviewed for a magazine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How do I look, Trainer? Is my skirt on straight?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wearing my signature racewear outside of a race
feels kinda weird.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I won't be running, but I'm still all fired up for
some reason.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel. The only time you put on
your signature racewear is when you're ready for
battle.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just putting it on gets me in a serious
mood!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I hope I don't hype myself up too much and end
up making strange faces during the interview...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
By the way, why aren't Sei, Grass, and El here
yet?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: They've still got time. We're just here early.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess I'm just too excited to sit still!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're the star here, so you need to act like one.
Behold my majestic presence, for example, and
try to emulate it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You didn't get here early because you were
nervous?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why, I would never! It's not like I was so
elated that I mistook the time or anything!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, our photo shoot is first, and after that,
there's the interview. Correct?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's what I heard... Gahhh, just the idea of
getting my picture taken is making me nervous!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm still not sure what pose I should make.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What do I do? I don't want to stand out and look
like a weirdo...
choice_data_list:
You should let out all of the emotions that are
bubbling up inside of you.

How about a pose that shows you've got your
rival in mind?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The emotions that are... bubbling up inside of
me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Remember what you said earlier? About feeling
fired up whenever you put on your signature
racewear?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, yeah! So I should just show off how I'm
feeling whenever I have my signature racewear
on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You don't need any accessories for that. You just
have to show them you're giving it all you've got,
no?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll try to show them my burning hot
passion!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My rivals, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you staring at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting a good look at your pose, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure your trainer meant "in mind" as your drive
to defeat them, not mimic them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I get it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My drive to beat my rivals... All right, that's what
I'll try and show 'em!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But this signature racewear is really something
special. It fills me with the desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're all dear friends to me, but at the same
time, you're also my rivals. So I'm gonna run as
fast as I can and take first place!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I accept your challenge. And I'm sure
the other three will too.
choice_data_list:
Racing against your rivals will push you all to
new heights!

Racing against your rivals will push you all to
new heights!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Today is just a photo shoot, but we'll all be
wearing these same outfits the next time we meet
on the turf!
